parsed.availability_comment: Recent public record shows squad retention and domestic appearances; one Dec 2025 Vijay Hazare innings ended retired hurt, but no later evidence found of a continuing issue.
parsed.availability_note: No current GT/injury/suspension concern found; domestic player with no overseas-release risk.
parsed.followup_reason: No active availability red flag found; role appears depth-only unless GT signal a preseason promotion.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Competes with multiple established domestic and spin-bowling options rather than for an overseas slot.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap does not apply. Main barrier is Indian spin/all-round depth.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained domestic all-rounder, but GT's spin/all-round slots look crowded by Washington Sundar, Rahul Tewatia, Rashid Khan, Sai Kishore and others.
